analysis.test: Reproduction or representation of a protected work without authorization: establish (i) the existence of an original work, (ii) the incorporation of original elements (qualitative similarity), (iii) the absence of authorization from the rights holder — Article L122-4 CPI
analysis.faits: Méridian Studios exploits Bastille (Kbis, Exhibit 1; trademark no. 4449595, Exhibit 2; order […] 2 dated 07/24/2018, Exhibit 7). Cassiopée, through Camille Lefèvre, asserts rights in Bastille and accuses Méridian Studios of exploiting it without authorization through Quiz Mania. A bailiff's report (procès-verbal of Maître Thomas Berger, Exhibit 5) dated 10/02/2019 documents the exploitation of Tohu-Bohu. Exhibit 6 Bis (Amazon screenshot dated 01/20/2020) and Exhibit 3 (extract from jedisjeux.net) establish the effective commercialization of Bastille by Méridian Studios. The CA Paris (adverse Exhibit 14, 11/10/2020) found the originality of games claimed by Cassiopée in related litigation and characterized 'quasi-slavish reproductions.' The TJ Paris (adverse Exhibit 12, 12/18/2020) ruled in litigation between Cassiopée and Méridian Studios on copyright infringement and unfair competition. The certified accountant Camille Lefèvre's attestation (Exhibit 3) records variations in Bastille sales for 2020/2021 on Amazon and at […], establishing continuous commercial exploitation.
analysis.faille: Absence of a formalized comparative table […] identifying the original elements of Bastille ([…], game mechanics, graphic presentation, rules) and the elements reproduced in Tohu-Bohu — without such a side-by-side analysis, the court cannot characterize the similarity constituting copyright infringement within the meaning of L122-4. Moreover, the chain of title to the copyright in Bastille in favor of Méridian Studios (assignment or […] work-for-hire/commissioned work) must be documented for the action to be maintainable.
analysis.riposte: Copyright protection arises from […] creation and not from registration; Méridian Studios establishes the priority of its exploitation (commission […] 2 dated 07/24/2018, Kbis, registered trademark) and the chain of […] of Bastille. The adverse decisions (Exhibits 12 and 14) concern distinct disputes involving other games or other parties and cannot prejudge ownership in the present proceedings. The bailiff's report […] of 10/02/2019 establishes the unauthorized reproduction of elements of Bastille in Tohu-Bohu, independently of the related litigation.

autorites.title: L122-4 — Code de la propriété intellectuelle
Cass. civ. 1, 96-20.194, 16 Feb. 1999
themes: reproduction, représentation ou exploitation d'une oeuvre en violation des droits de l'auteur
reproduction et fabrication de meubles créés par un tiers
reproduction en dessins et fabrication de meubles créés par un tiers
autorites.summary:
La contrefaçon est caractérisée, indépendamment de toute mauvaise foi, par la reproduction, la représentation ou l'exploitation d'une oeuvre de l'esprit en violation des droits de son auteur.
 Ainsi sont légalement déclarés auteurs d'une contrefaçon la décoratrice […] a, dans un projet d'aménagement intérieur d'un hôtel, reproduit en dessins des meubles créés par un tiers, la société d'exploitation de l'hôtel […] a fait fabriquer les meubles contrefaisants, et leur fabricant.

analysis.acte_referme: Supplemental bailiff's report or court-appointed expert report setting out an element-by-element comparative table ([…], game mechanics, graphic charter, rules) […] between Bastille and Tohu-Bohu, accompanied by a copyright assignment agreement or a […] contract establishing Méridian Studios' ownership.
analysis.moyen_adverse: Cassiopée/Camille Lefèvre contends that Méridian Studios is itself an infringer of Bastille, of which Cassiopée is the true author/rights holder, so that Méridian Studios cannot assert any copyright in the work to bring an infringement action against Tohu-Bohu — thereby turning the standing argument against the […].

statut_preuve.pourquoi: The bailiff's report of 02/10/2019 documents the existence of Tohu-Bohu but does not contain a formalized comparative table […] the original elements of Bastille ([…], mechanics, graphic presentation, rules) and the elements reproduced in Tohu-Bohu. Without this qualitative side-by-side analysis, the similarity constituting copyright infringement within the meaning of Article L. 122-4 has not been established. Furthermore, the chain of title to the copyright in Bastille in favor of Méridian Studios (assignment or […] employee/commissioned work) remains to be formally documented.

analysis.these_adverse: Cassiopée files Exhibit 12 (TJ Paris, 12/18/2020) and Exhibit 14 (CA Paris, 11/10/2020) to demonstrate that it is recognized as the copyright owner of games in its product line and that Méridian Studios has already been sued for copyright infringement in related litigation, which […] undermines Méridian Studios' standing to bring the present action. Cassiopée further argues that Méridian Studios has failed to demonstrate any qualitative similarity […] between Tohu-Bohu and Bastille, in the absence of a comparative table, and that the bailiff's report merely records the existence of Tohu-Bohu without analyzing the elements allegedly reproduced. Finally, Cassiopée may contend that Camille Lefèvre is a co-author or the original author of Bastille, such that he cannot be held liable for infringement of his own work.

pieces_adverses.piece: Adverse Exhibit 12 — Tribunal judiciaire de Paris, 12/18/2020, Cassiopée v. Méridian Studios (infringement judgment)
pieces_adverses.contre: This judgment concerns a distinct dispute and does not have res judicata effect on the present proceedings; it does not rule on the ownership of copyright in Bastille in the context of the action Méridian Studios v. Cassiopée/Tohu-Bohu

pieces_adverses.piece: Adverse Exhibit 14 — Cour d'appel de Paris, 11/10/2020 (recognition of originality of Cassiopée games)
pieces_adverses.contre: This decision concerns other games ([…], CORAIL, CHÂTEAU FANTÔMES) and not Bastille; it cannot be transposed without demonstrating the identity of the original elements asserted.

pieces_adverses.piece: Attestation or agreement establishing that Camille Lefèvre is a co-author or original author of Bastille
pieces_adverses.contre: Challenge the certain date and authenticity of any unregistered document; counter with Méridian Studios' priority evidence (commission […] 2 dated 07/24/2018, Kbis, trademark).

pieces_attendues: Formalized comparative chart ([…], mechanics, graphic design, rules) Bastille vs. Tohu-Bohu, prepared by an expert or bailiff.
Copyright assignment deed or […] agreement establishing Méridian Studios' ownership of Bastille
Supplementary bailiff's report documenting the elements reproduced in Tohu-Bohu with dated screenshots
Witness statements from the creators/employees of Méridian Studios who contributed to the […] of Bastille (originality and priority)
